title: Section 33
content: 1[33. Other business which the State Bank may transact.-- Subject to the other provisions contained in this Act, the State Bank may carry on and transact the business of banking as defined in clause (b) of section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949), and may engage in one or more of the other forms of business specified in sub-section (1) of section 6 of that Act.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 48 of 1973, s. 12, for section 33 (w.e.f. 1-3-1977).
